mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id, assessment_id, unit_id, route_code, year, index_code, index_name, index_value, grade, raw_metrics::text AS raw_metrics, calculation_version, calculated_at FROM index_result WHERE ORDER BY route_code ASC, year DESC, index_code ASC

SELECT id, task_id, assessment_id, unit_id, route_code, year, index_code, index_name, index_value, grade, raw_metrics::text AS raw_metrics, calculation_version, calculated_at FROM index_result WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id} AND deleted = false
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO index_result(id, tenant_id, task_id, assessment_id, unit_id, route_id, section_id, route_code, direction, start_stake, end_stake, year, index_code, index_name, index_value, grade, raw_metrics, calculation_version, calculated_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{taskId}, #{assessmentId}, #{unitId}, #{routeId}, #{sectionId}, #{routeCode}, #{direction}, #{startStake}, #{endStake}, #{year}, #{indexCode}, #{indexName}, #{indexValue}, #{grade}, CAST(#{rawMetrics} AS jsonb)NULL, #{calculationVersion}, now(), now(), now(), false)
mapper.update: UPDATE index_result SET task_id=#{taskId}, assessment_id=#{assessmentId}, unit_id=#{unitId}, route_id=#{routeId}, section_id=#{sectionId}, route_code=#{routeCode}, direction=#{direction}, start_stake=#{startStake}, end_stake=#{endStake}, year=#{year}, index_code=#{indexCode}, index_name=#{indexName}, index_value=#{indexValue}, grade=#{grade}, raw_metrics=CAST(#{rawMetrics} AS jsonb)NULL, calculation_version=#{calculationVersion}, updated_at=now() WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND id=#{id} AND deleted=false
